'''tomavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctitropic|nyctitropic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctitropic|nyctitropic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tomavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tomavithi|tomavithi]] || [[word:tomaviji|tomaviji]] || [[word:tomavishi|tomavishi]] || [[word:tomaviki|tomaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tomavuthuthu|tomavuthuthu]] || [[word:tomavujuju|tomavujuju]] || [[word:tomavushushu|tomavushushu]] || [[word:tomavukuku|tomavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tomavuthu|tomavuthu]] || [[word:tomavuju|tomavuju]] || [[word:tomavushu|tomavushu]] || [[word:tomavuku|tomavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tomavufthuf|tomavufthuf]] || [[word:tomavufjuf|tomavufjuf]] || [[word:tomavufshuf|tomavufshuf]] || [[word:tomavufkuf|tomavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tomavethe|tomavethe]] || [[word:tomaveje|tomaveje]] || [[word:tomaveshe|tomaveshe]] || [[word:tomaveke|tomaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tomavothotho|tomavothotho]] || [[word:tomavojojo|tomavojojo]] || [[word:tomavoshosho|tomavoshosho]] || [[word:tomavokoko|tomavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tomavotho|tomavotho]] || [[word:tomavojo|tomavojo]] || [[word:tomavosho|tomavosho]] || [[word:tomavoko|tomavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tomavofthof|tomavofthof]] || [[word:tomavofjof|tomavofjof]] || [[word:tomavofshof|tomavofshof]] || [[word:tomavofkof|tomavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfthĂŻf|tomavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfjĂŻf|tomavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfshĂŻf|tomavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfkĂŻf|tomavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|tomavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|tomavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|tomavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|tomavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfthĂŻf|tomavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfjĂŻf|tomavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfshĂŻf|tomavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfkĂŻf|tomavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfthĂŻf|tomavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfjĂŻf|tomavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfshĂŻf|tomavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tomavĂŻfkĂŻf|tomavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tomavĂŠthĂŠ|tomavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:tomavĂŠjĂŠ|tomavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:tomavĂŠshĂŠ|tomavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:tomavĂŠkĂŠ|tomavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tomavathatha|tomavathatha]] || [[word:tomavajaja|tomavajaja]] || [[word:tomavashasha|tomavashasha]] || [[word:tomavakaka|tomavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tomavatha|tomavatha]] || [[word:tomavaja|tomavaja]] || [[word:tomavasha|tomavasha]] || [[word:tomavaka|tomavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tomavafthaf|tomavafthaf]] || [[word:tomavafjaf|tomavafjaf]] || [[word:tomavafshaf|tomavafshaf]] || [[word:tomavafkaf|tomavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tomavasha|tomavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tomavshĂ«sha|tomavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tomavrosha|tomavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tomavmusha|tomavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tomavyasha|tomavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotomavnkshĂ«sha|gotomavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotomavnkrosha|gotomavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotomavnkmusha|gotomavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotomavnkyasha|gotomavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tomamavasha|tomamavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tomamavshĂ«sha|tomamavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tomamavrosha|tomamavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tomamavmusha|tomamavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tomamavyasha|tomamavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotomamavnkshĂ«sha|gotomamavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotomamavnkrosha|gotomamavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotomamavnkmusha|gotomamavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotomamavnkyasha|gotomamavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:temĂŠvasha|temĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:temĂŠvshĂ«sha|temĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:temĂŠvrosha|temĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:temĂŠvmusha|temĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:temĂŠvyasha|temĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotemĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|gotemĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotemĂŠvnkrosha|gotemĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotemĂŠvnkmusha|gotemĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotemĂŠvnkyasha|gotemĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tomfavasha|tomfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tomfavshĂ«sha|tomfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tomfavrosha|tomfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tomfavmusha|tomfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tomfavyasha|tomfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotomfavnkshĂ«sha|gotomfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotomfavnkrosha|gotomfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotomfavnkmusha|gotomfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotomfavnkyasha|gotomfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
